description: Style NoteIn a sensual bottle, Bright Crystal by versace features a high-glam design with sheer crystal transparency, true to its name. Light and long lasting, Bright Crystal is a precious jewel of rare beauty characterized by fresh, vibrant, flowery scents of pomegranate, yuzu, frosted accord, peony, magnolia, lotus, plant amber, musk, and mahogany.Quantity: 90 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
